plugin_desc: Collect load balancer traffic from NetFlow and convert it into normalized device traffic metrics.
name: Loadbalance

metrics.name: device_total_incoming_netflow_traffic
metrics.display_name: Device Total Incoming NetFlow Traffic Rate
metrics.description: Normalized incoming traffic from NetFlow flow data.

metrics.name: device_total_outgoing_netflow_traffic
metrics.display_name: Device Total Outgoing NetFlow Traffic Rate
metrics.description: Normalized outgoing traffic from NetFlow flow data.
